title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you call any model served by the local Ollama server inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-js on npm
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-python on PyPI
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model support.

title: jmorganca/ollama-hub
summary: Community-curated list of tools, extensions, and integrations for Ollama.

title: ollama-vscode by mjmac
summary: VS Code extension that adds Ollama chat and code-generation commands inside the editor.

title: ollama-raycast by kevinw
summary: Raycast extension to query any local Ollama model from the macOS launcher.

title: ollama-copilot by cmiller
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot-style code-completion service backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-discord by coleam00
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli by raju
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) client for Ollama written in Go; browse, chat, manage models.

title: ollama-helm by bjw-s
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-ex by kevin-signals
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama REST API with GenServer-based streaming.

title: ollama-rust by Abdulla
summary: Async Rust client for Ollama using reqwest and serde.

title: ollama-dart by halildurmus
summary: Dart/Flutter package to integrate local LLMs via Ollama into mobile/desktop apps.

title: ollama-nix by nix-community
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama and popular models reproducibly.

title: ollama-slack by tony
summary: Slack bot that listens in channels and responds using Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian by jonathan
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside your notes and get inline completions.

title: ollama-haystack by deepset
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp by ollama-net
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and dependency-injection helpers.
